title: 20 Mule Team
writer: Owen Atkinson, Robert C. DuSoe, Cyril Hume
actors: Wallace Beery, Leo Carrillo, Marjorie Rambeau
plot: In California's Death Valley, in 1892, borax miners scratch a hard living until a map pinpointing the location of high-grade borax surfaces, sending prospectors and crooks alike into a gold-rush-like frenzy.
